name: bakery-tech-pro
description: Professional bakery equipment website with multi-language support and modular architecture

scripts.build: webpack --mode=production && node scripts/copy-translations.js && node scripts/build-i18n.js && npm run split:lang
scripts.build:fast: webpack --mode=production && node scripts/copy-translations.js && node scripts/build-i18n.js && npm run split:lang
scripts.build:static: webpack --mode=production && node scripts/copy-translations.js && node scripts/build-i18n.js && npm run split:lang && node scripts/verify-static-build.js
scripts.build:withFeishu: node scripts/ensure-product-data-table.js && npm run i18n:extract && npm run product:sync:source && npm run merge:i18n && npm run translate:products && npm run product:sync && npm run split:lang && npm run build
scripts.build:static:withFeishu: node scripts/ensure-product-data-table.js && npm run i18n:extract && npm run product:sync:source && npm run merge:i18n && npm run translate:products && npm run product:sync && npm run split:lang && npm run build:static
scripts.build:production: node scripts/ensure-product-data-table.js && npm run i18n:extract && npm run product:sync:source && npm run merge:i18n && npm run translate:products && npm run product:sync && npm run split:lang && npm run build && npm run build:static
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:all:fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run lint:css:fix

author: YuKoLi Technology
